stage_identity.evidence: Teen-stage Byte with gangly proportions maintained. Multi-image edit used stage anchor as reference for canonical proportions. Blue-ish pixel blob form recognizable with big expressive eyes.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean 2D pixel art forms preserved. Dithered shading visible. Readable silhouette maintained for Byte's teen form. No photorealistic drift detected.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Evening lighting transition applied - purple-blue twilight tones visible through window. Chicago skyline shows evening illumination with twinkling city lights. Byte positioned gazing toward window with anticipation pose.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text or floating glyphs detected. No malformed anatomy or duplicated parts. No smeared objects. Clean render with proper pixel boundaries.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Trophy shelf above desk with single golden 10-day trophy positioned on left side. Single green plant friend on right side of shelf with clear spacing between. One food bowl on floor to right of desk with moderate kibble level (~60% satiety). No duplicate props, no overlapping objects.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk present center stage. Oversized laptop visible with soft screen glow. Chicago skyline window prominent behind Byte with evening cityscape visible.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Evening time-of-day correctly rendered with purple-blue twilight lighting. Byte awake (not sleeping), no Z symbols present. Ecstatic mood reflected in anticipatory gaze toward window. 9-hour wait context shows as patient anticipation rather than distress.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Normal mode edit - re-ground cleanup check not applicable. Previous re-ground #29 established clean base state.
